    <View /> <Product /> <div className="toolbar bottom"> <Pagination /> </div> </article> </div> <div className="sidebar col-sm-3 col-xs-12 col-sm-pull-9"> <Sort products={products} onGetProduct={onGetProduct}/> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </Layout> ); }; ShopList.getInitialProps = async function() { const res = await fetch('https://carpo.herokuapp.com/products'); const data = await res.json(); return { products : data }; }; export default ShopList;
